source_name: UI v2 Mission Control source branch
license_summary: Internal design/source branch; patterns can inform first-party AgentOps MIS UI slices, but the branch is not accepted as a direct product merge.
allowed_operations: Study Mission Control information architecture, attention-first panels, semantic tokens, status/risk pills, and responsive evidence capture.
Reimplement one bounded component or read model at a time on current main.
Reuse product language only after matching current AgentOps MIS routes, APIs, and evidence boundaries.
Use screenshots or PR inventory as non-authoritative design evidence.
forbidden_operations: Do not merge PR #11 directly while it is draft, dirty, and based on an older branch.
Do not replace current AppShell, routing, Pixel Office, Run Ledger, Approval Gate, or Agent Gateway UI without a separate first-party migration slice and UI smoke.
Do not let Mission Control view models become a second source of truth for AgentOps MIS workspace, agent, task, run, approval, memory, artifact, evaluation, runtime event, or audit authority.
Do not import screenshot artifacts, node_modules, dist, cache, generated UI evidence, local DBs, or env files.
Do not ingest raw prompts, raw responses, credentials, tokens, private messages, full transcripts, generated exports, or customer raw documents.
runtime_requirements: No runtime required for CI acceptance.
Optional Vite build only after selecting a current-main first-party UI slice.
No live Hermes/OpenClaw execution required for this packet.
product_claim_limit: AgentOps MIS has a governed UI v2 reference packet; no PR #11 shell, Mission Control route, generated screenshot workflow, or read-model replacement is product-merged by this packet.
rollback_plan: Remove this packet or keep it as rejected/incubator evidence; current AgentOps MIS workspace, run ledger, approval, memory, evaluation, audit and Pixel Office routes remain authoritative.
